summary: Crystal‑clear audience recording that captures the legendary performance with vivid crowd ambience
review: The remastered audience tape is praised as one of the clearest ever, letting every concertgoer’s reaction ring through alongside the band. Reviewers assume the playing is already top‑notch for this show and focus on how realistic the sound feels—almost more immersive than a typical matrix mix.

ai_rating.rationale: A single detailed 5‑star review highlights an exceptional audience recording and implies a high‑quality performance, leading to a strong overall rating despite limited data.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Remastered with extraordinary clarity; every crowd reaction and band detail audible, creating a realistic listening experience that surpasses typical matrix mixes.

show_quality.setlist_flow: No specific comments on individual songs or set pacing; reviewers focus on overall performance quality and audience atmosphere.
